# Valar

Valar is a local speech stack for Apple Silicon: TTS, ASR, forced alignment, voices, daemon, and MCP bridge.

Primary docs:
- README.md
- docs/prerequisites-and-expectations.md
- docs/working-models.md
- docs/model-quickstart.md
- docs/faq.md
- docs/use-cases.md
- docs/integrations.md
- docs/architecture.md
- docs/lineage-upstream-references.md

Public support and policy docs:
- SUPPORT.md
- SECURITY.md
- PRIVACY.md
- CONTRIBUTING.md
- CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md

Stable public interfaces:
- make quickstart
- make first-clip
- valartts doctor
- valartts models list
- valartts models info
- valartts models install
- valartts speak
- valartts transcribe
- valartts align
- /v1/health
- /v1/capabilities
- /v1/models
- /v1/runtime

Public model families:
- Soprano
- Qwen
- VibeVoice
- Voxtral
